PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-10-2009 Continued To Feb-26-09 At 01:30 P.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: John Vaught specially appearing for Leonardo Drubach for Alberto Onate. Harald Westendorf for and with Irene Medeiros.

The Parties presented oral argument with regard to Alberto Onate's status of residency in the United States. The Court set the matter for an evidentiary hearing on this issue for February 26, 2009.

Judge: David L. Ballati. Reporter: Susan Lee, CSR#4280. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Shannon.
